Title: Book A - NSW Font
Description:
Book A - NSW Font supports Foundation/Prep teachers with explicit handwriting instruction in NSW Font.

Book A covers a-z single sounds on a solid line, then moves into digraphs including /sh/, /ch/ and /ng/ on 24mm dotted thirds. It also includes numeral handwriting practice.

Designed around short, focused daily handwriting lessons, this workbook helps students practise letter formation while reinforcing phonics, reading and spelling knowledge.

Title: Book B - NSW Font
Description:
Book B - NSW Font supports Grade 1 teachers with explicit handwriting instruction in NSW Font.

Book B includes explicit teaching of extended code including /ee/, /ie/ and /air/ on 24mm dotted thirds, with revision of simple code to build automaticity. It also includes numeral handwriting practice.

Designed around short, focused daily handwriting lessons, this workbook helps students practise letter formation while reinforcing phonics, reading and spelling knowledge.

Title: Book A - Tas Font
Description:
Book A - Tas Font supports Foundation/Prep teachers with explicit handwriting instruction in Tasmanian Beginner.

Book A covers a-z single sounds, then moves into CCVC, CVCC, CCVCC, CCCVC and digraphs on dotted thirds. It also includes numeral handwriting practice.

Designed around short, focused daily handwriting lessons, this workbook helps students practise letter formation while reinforcing phonics, reading and spelling knowledge.

Title: Book B - Tas Font
Description:
Book B - Tas Font supports Grade 1 teachers with explicit handwriting instruction in Tasmanian Beginner.

Book B includes explicit teaching of digraphs, ending spelling patterns, vowel teams and suffixes on 24mm dotted thirds, with revision of a-z to build automaticity. It also includes numeral handwriting practice.

Designed around short, focused daily handwriting lessons, this workbook helps students practise letter formation while reinforcing phonics, reading and spelling knowledge.

Title: Book C - Tas Font
Description:
Book C - Tas Font supports Grade 2 teachers with explicit handwriting instruction in Tasmanian Beginner.

Book C includes explicit teaching of vowel teams, suffixes, affixes and low frequency spellings on 24mm dotted thirds, with built-in review to build automaticity.

Designed around short, focused daily handwriting lessons, this workbook helps students practise letter formation while reinforcing phonics, reading and spelling knowledge.
